prompt: A high-fashion double exposure portrait in a cinematic, artistic style. A full-body, low-angle shot of a young woman sitting cross-legged on a grey concrete floor. She has long, dark wavy hair and wears ornate silver chandelier earrings and a silver watch. Her outfit consists of a rich deep burgundy silk button-down blouse, wide-leg white palazzo trousers, and chunky grey athletic sneakers. She faces the camera with a soft, natural presence.* *Behind her, a massive, ethereal grayscale profile of her own face emerges, looking toward the right. The background blends seamlessly into expressive abstract textures made of dark charcoal brushstrokes, paint splatters, and soft grey tones, resembling a dramatic oil or acrylic painting.* *Lighting is soft and natural on the foreground subject, while the background features high-contrast monochrome tones for a moody, elegant atmosphere. Professional photography, ultra-detailed, 8K resolution, artistic fusion of realism and digital painting, double exposure effect, high-fashion editorial aesthetic.
